ham: Hi, main Prashant hoon from XYZ Broadband. Main 15 May 2024 ko 10:00 AM pe aapke location par aunga. Please ensure someone is available. Thanks.
spam: Dear sir/madam, aapke gaadi ke liye traffic challan issue hua hai. Aapko 24 ghante ke andar e-challan pay karna hoga. Agar nahi kiya to penalty badhegi. Click <URL>
